name: Chicken Fried Steak and Gravy
recipeInstructions:
1. Tenderize the round steak.
2. Dip the steak in milk, then flour seasoned with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Fry the steak in deep fat at approximately 375 Degrees F until golden brown.
4. After frying, remove the steak and leave about 4 tablespoons of fat in the pan.
5. Add the remaining 4 tablespoons of flour to the pan and stir until smooth.
6. Gradually add 1 quart of milk while continuously stirring.
7. Cook until the gravy thickens.
8. Serve with the fried steak. Enjoy!
